entries.name: Clear harbour heat
entries.description: Crowds are active; dehydration risk for long chases.

entries.name: Humid market haze
entries.description: Perception checks in packed streets are slightly harder.

entries.name: Short tropical shower
entries.description: Streets slick; racing beasts harder to control.

entries.name: Sea breeze
entries.description: Travel and city movement feel easier.

entries.name: Thunder over harbour
entries.description: Ships delay departures; sailors grow restless.

entries.name: Hot wind from jungle
entries.description: Tempers rise; exhaustion risk for armour.

entries.name: Festival-bright skies
entries.description: Public events, races and crowds swell.
